zh.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh是Alexander Napier of Merchiston的兒子，於大約1415年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾。他與Elizabeth Lauder在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1474年2月15日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓享年60歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh是Alexander Napier of Merchiston的儿子，于大约1415年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾。他与Elizabeth Lauder在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1474年2月15日在苏格兰米德洛迪安梅斯頓享年60岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Napier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Old French napier, nappier, nap(p)er(er) ‘one who looks after the napery or table-linen’, a derivative of Old French nappe ‘table-cloth, napkin’. In Middle English, Napier and Nap(p)er might also have denoted a maker of table cloths, though this sense has not been recorded.

English: alternatively an occupational name from Nap(p)er from an unrecorded Middle English word for one who makes naps, i.e. drinking cups or chalices (Middle English nap, Old English hnæp). Napper could also be a nickname from Middle English nappere ‘one who sleeps or naps’, though this is the least likely of the alternatives.
American shortened form of Polish   Napierala   or a similar name.

variants.name: Napper
meanings: Altered form of English or German   Knapper   or of German   Nepper  .

variants.name: Nappier
meanings: English: variant of   Napier  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Napierala
meanings: Polish (Napierała): nickname for an insistent person,from a derivative of napierać ‘advance, press, urge’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh was born about 1415, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Alexander Napier of Merchiston. He married Elizabeth Lauder in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 February 1474, in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh est né environ 1415, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fils de Alexander Napier of Merchiston. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lauder à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 février 1474, à Merchiston, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh wurde um 1415 in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Alexander Napier of Merchiston geboren. Er hat in Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Lauder geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1474 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh è nato il circa 1415 nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlio di Alexander Napier of Merchiston. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lauder nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 febbraio 1474, nel Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburghは約1415年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでAlexander Napier of Merchistonの息子として生まれた。イギリススコットランドでElizabeth Lauderと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1474年2月15日にスコットランドミドロスアンメルチストンで60歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh(은)는 대략 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 Alexander Napier of Merchiston의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Elizabeth Lauder(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1474년 2월 15일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 머치스턴에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filho de Alexander Napier of Merchiston. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Lauder em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1474, em Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh родился около 1415 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Alexander Napier of Merchiston. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lauder в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 февраля 1474 г. в местности мирчистон, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh nació aproximadamente 1415, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hijo de Alexander Napier of Merchiston. Se casó con Elizabeth Lauder en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1474, en Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido.
